plugin_desc: Radwin wireless broadband PtP and PtMP SNMP child template for devices under enterprise PEN 4458. The current MIB facts confirm RADWIN-MIB-WINLINK1000 and Radwin enterprise identity, but this production pass has no stable row-filter-free CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply health OID to promote into shared device health. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Wireless SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics and aggregate traffic through the generic snmp/wireless metric model while this plugin provides the Radwin collect_type, UI and Telegraf child template.
name: Wireless
